caption: A sequence of images showcases a promotional graphic for Ohio University Libraries. Each frame features a banner at the top containing several small, historical images, including a black-and-white photo of a building, a group of people, a stylized portrait of a man with a mustache, and a document signed "E. W. SCRIFFS." To the left of these images is a logo for "OHIO UNIVERSITY LIBRARIES" with the words "DIGITAL INITIATIVES" underneath. As the sequence progresses, white text gradually fades in below the banner. First, the line "Digital Initiatives @ Ohio University Libraries" appears, followed by the sentence "The Libraries unique resources online." Finally, the URL "http://media.library.ohiou.edu" becomes visible at the bottom. By the final frame, all the text is fully displayed against the solid black background, while the top banner remains static throughout.
